HomePage.name: Xiaoman
HomePage.bio: Passionate about technology, focused on building efficient and reliable backend systems. Love exploring new technologies and pursuing code artistry.
HomePage.aboutDesc: I'm a backend engineer from Shandong University, specializing in Java stack development. With solid computer science fundamentals, I'm passionate about solving complex engineering problems.
HomePage.skillsDetail: Java / Spring Boot / Middleware / Distributed Systems
HomePage.projectsDesc: Featured projects showcasing technical skills and practical results

timelineEvents.2022: Admitted to Shandong University School of Computer Science
timelineEvents.2024: Won programming competition awards and CSP certification
timelineEvents.2025: Interned at Alibaba International, received offers from Huawei, Xiaomi, Alibaba, Honor, ZTE
timelineEvents.2026: Graduated, joined Honor as a full-time engineer

ExperiencePage.title: Work
ExperiencePage.subtitle: From campus to workplace, growing all the way
ExperiencePage.summary1: Deeply involved in payment architecture upgrade and stability governance, led the development of an intelligent diagnosis Agent platform.
ExperiencePage.project1_1_detail1_desc: Implemented dynamic user-ID-based traffic splitting with configurable switches for smooth new page rollouts in payment and transaction domains.
ExperiencePage.project1_1_detail2_desc: Participated in Klarna channel minimum threshold A/B experiments, dynamically adjusting payment limits to support data-driven decisions.
ExperiencePage.project1_1_detail3_desc: Identified root cause of Card Bin field loss due to async timing issues in new card payments, designed a delayed parsing solution to backfill data from MQ callbacks.
ExperiencePage.project1_2_title: Lead: Lazada Payment AIOps & Intelligent Diagnosis Agent
ExperiencePage.project1_2_detail1_desc: Built payment domain intelligent agent based on Spring AI, unified SLS logging, EagleEye monitoring, ODPS data queries via MCP protocol.
ExperiencePage.project1_2_detail2_desc: Built document vectorization storage and retrieval pipeline, achieved 85%+ accuracy through chunking and TopK parameter tuning.
ExperiencePage.project1_2_detail3_desc: Implemented with ReAct pattern, supporting multi-turn dialogue with context memory for business consulting, alert self-healing, and ticket pre-processing.
ExperiencePage.project1_2_detail4_desc: Implemented with Plan-Execute-Replan pattern, built a closed loop: retrieve knowledge -> plan investigation -> query tools -> analyze root cause -> generate recommendations.
ExperiencePage.project1_2_detail5_desc: Designed L4(intent routing) + L5(data analysis) dual-layer architecture. Used white-box approach combining ODPS data warehouse with standard deviation/linear regression algorithms.
ExperiencePage.summary2: Participated in enterprise IT system backend development, responsible for authentication, file storage, performance optimization and real-time messaging.
ExperiencePage.project2_1_detail1_desc: Implemented stateless JWT-based authentication with Spring interceptors for cluster environments. Used SHA-256 with Salt for password hashing to prevent rainbow table attacks.
ExperiencePage.project2_2_detail1_desc: Optimized file upload module with MinIO for chunked upload, resumable upload and instant deduplication.
ExperiencePage.project2_3_detail1_desc: Solved deep pagination issues using deferred join technique for employee record queries, reducing query time from 2.3s to 0.8s.
ExperiencePage.project2_4_detail1_desc: Built highly available real-time message push service based on WebSocket, providing sub-second todo reminders.
ExperiencePage.ctaTitle: Want to know more about my projects?

ProjectsPage.title: Project
ProjectsPage.subtitle: Featured projects, showcasing technical practice and innovation
ProjectsPage.project1_desc: High-performance task scheduling platform based on Redis + Kafka, supporting distributed deployment, task sharding and retry mechanisms.
ProjectsPage.project2_desc: Complete e-commerce backend solution with user, product, order and payment modules, using Spring Cloud microservices architecture.
ProjectsPage.project3_desc: Visual platform for multi-source data collection, cleansing and analysis, supporting real-time processing and custom reports.
ProjectsPage.project4_desc: An elegant local Markdown note-taking app with immersive dual-pane editing experience.
